posts.title: 終於買到馬莎龍蝦湯！ 係方便慳時間嘅😆 Btw呢樽湯味道偏濃，可以加鮮奶平衡返嗆喉嘅味道 同埋入面成份有酒，要煮滾令酒精揮發，就唔會有苦味！
posts.text:
終於買到馬莎龍蝦湯！
係方便慳時間嘅😆
Btw呢樽湯味道偏濃，可以加鮮奶平衡返嗆喉嘅味道
同埋入面成份有酒，要煮滾令酒精揮發，就唔會有苦味！

topComments.content: any SaaS founders here tried OpenClaw? is it actually worth using for AI projects? or just hype? honest reviews only 翻譯 23 41 1

I've dabbled with OpenClaw for a few of my own AI projects and found it to be a solid tool, especially for data preprocessing and model training. That being said, I've also encountered some limitations with its scalability, so I'd love to hear from others who've had more extensive experiences with it. 翻譯 1 1
